memoryArtifacts.headline: Joan, daughter and heir of William de Welles
memoryArtifacts.description: An inquisition post mortem proof of age document identifies Joan’s father as William de Welles, her mother as Agnes, and her husband as Henry de Coggeshale, son of John de Coggeshale.

popularStory.headline: Joan, daughter and heir of William de Welles
popularStory.description: An inquisition post mortem proof of age document identifies Joan’s father as William de Welles, her mother as Agnes, and her husband as Henry de Coggeshale, son of John de Coggeshale.

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Coggeshall於大約1301年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親John de Coggeshall24歲，母親Mrs. Of Peu Cogeshall20歲。他於1324年與Margaret Staunton在英國英格蘭艾可布萊崔結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1361年6月4日在英國艾可可格沙拉爾享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Coggeshall于大约1301年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲John de Coggeshall24岁，母亲Mrs. Of Peu Cogeshall20岁。他于1324年与Margaret Staunton在英国英格兰艾可布萊崔结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1361年6月4日在英国艾可可格沙拉爾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coggeshall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex): habitational name from Coggeshall in Essex, named from an Old English personal name Cogg + halh ‘nook’.

History: This name was taken to America in 1632 by John Coggeshall, who became first governor of RI, and in 1635 by John Cogswell. In 1887 a descendant, Daniel Cogswell, founded Cogswell College, San Francisco.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Coggeshall was born about 1301, in Essex, England, his father, John de Coggeshall, was 24 and his mother, Mrs. Of Peu Cogeshall, was 20. He married Margaret Staunton in 1324, in Braintree, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 June 1361, in Coggeshall, Essex, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Coggeshall est né environ 1301, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, John de Coggeshall, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Of Peu Cogeshall, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Staunton en 1324, à Braintree, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1361, à Coggeshall, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Coggeshall um 1301 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Coggeshall 24 und seine Mutter Mrs. Of Peu Cogeshall 20. Er hat 1324 in Braintree, Essex, England, United Kingdom Margaret Staunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Juni 1361 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Coggeshall, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Coggeshall è nato il circa 1301 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, John de Coggeshall, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Of Peu Cogeshall, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Staunton nel 1324, nel Braintree, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 giugno 1361, nel Coggeshall, Essex, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Coggeshallが約1301年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父John de Coggeshallは24歳，母Mrs. Of Peu Cogeshallは20歳であった。1324年にイギリスイギリスエセックスブレイントレでMargaret Stauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1361年6月4日にイギリスエセックスコグジェシャルで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Coggeshall(이)가 대략 1301년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Coggeshall(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Of Peu Cogeshall(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 브레이트리에서 Margaret Staunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 6월 4일 영국 에세스 코그샤에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Coggeshall nasceu aproximadamente 1301, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Coggeshall, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Of Peu Cogeshall, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Staunton em 1324, em Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de junho de 1361, em Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Coggeshall родился около 1301 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Coggeshall было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Of Peu Cogeshall, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Staunton в 1324 г. в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 июня 1361 г. в местности когешолл, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Coggeshall nació aproximadamente 1301, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Coggeshall, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mrs. Of Peu Cogeshall, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret Staunton en 1324, en Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de junio de 1361, en Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
